testcase.name: test_service_not_found
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_api.py:48: in test_service_not_found assert response.status_code == 200 # API returns 200 with error ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code
